title: About Me
description: Hi, I'm King3. A frontend developer, open-source enthusiast, and creative soul.
heading: King3.
subtitle: Frontend engineer · Open-source builder · Based in
paragraph1: Turning the ideas in my head into something real is what drives me. I build tools I wish existed and publish them on <openknights>OpenKnights</openknights> and my <github>GitHub</github>. Find my <projects>full projects list here</projects>.
paragraph2: I write <blog>blog posts</blog> and share tips on <bilibili>哔哩哔哩</bilibili> about programming, open source, and lessons learned along the way.
paragraph3: Outside of code, I enjoy <photos>photography</photos>, collecting <poems>poems</poems>, reading novels, and <music>listening to music</music>. In case you are interested, here are the <uses>hardware/software I use</uses>.
paragraph4: I'm based in {{city}}, if you are around, please reach out and let's grab a coffee or work on something together.
